caption: The video captures a formal event at the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop and podium signage. A man in a gray blazer and brown pants is seen walking across the stage, gesturing with his right hand while holding onto the podium with his left. He appears to be addressing an audience seated in front of him. To his right, another man in a dark suit sits on a chair, attentively listening and observing the speaker. The setting suggests a panel discussion or a presentation, with the audience members focused on the speaker. The atmosphere is professional and engaged, typical of a conference or seminar environment.
